title: I gambled and ordered from ADV directly again
display_title: I gambled and ordered from ADV directly again
wikitext:
[]: I gambled and ordered from ADV directly again...             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Aug 10, 2005 9:50 pm ...during another recent sale. They delivered in 12 days. I may be the only customer but I can't complain given the ridiculously low prices! I picked up a bunch of stuff... Nadia Collection 1 and 2, Azumanga DVD1+box and DVD 3, another Platinum 1+Box, and RahXephon Movie+Box... Given that they have a bad reputation, I've been lucky so far and if they keep putting on these sales, I'll keep stocking up. Between Amazon and local trips to the anime section in Best Buy, ADV really has some killer deals.

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Wed Aug 10, 2005 10:05 pm "another Platinum 1+Box" Why is that ? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Aug 10, 2005 10:16 pm Sventevith wrote: "another Platinum 1+Box" Why is that ? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Wed Aug 10, 2005 10:57 pm Atleast you can sell it expensive if they cease to make these Platinum things... :S

[]: Re: I gambled and ordered from ADV directly again...             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Aug 11, 2005 10:52 pm Digitalex wrote: Between Amazon and local trips to the anime section in Best Buy, ADV really has some killer deals.

[]: Re: I gambled and ordered from ADV directly again...             Quote Post by Digitalex » Fri Aug 12, 2005 9:56 am drinian wrote: Digitalex wrote: Between Amazon and local trips to the anime section in Best Buy, ADV really has some killer deals.

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Mon Sep 19, 2005 3:04 pm I missed it. What bad reputation does ADV have? I've ordered from them a couple of times(their sales are way to good to pass up) and never had a problem.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Sep 19, 2005 3:15 pm I got Platinum edition DVD 2 for $12, too at Best Buy. I was like, wtf. is this a defect?

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Tue Sep 20, 2005 9:27 am Olin of Xephon wrote: I missed it. What bad reputation does ADV have? I've ordered from them a couple of times(their sales are way to good to pass up) and never had a problem.

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Mon Oct 10, 2005 8:35 pm my local best buy is also selling platinum #2 for $12... ah well, a bargain's a bargain.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Tue Oct 11, 2005 10:07 pm Toilet Duck wrote: my local best buy is also selling platinum #2 for $12... ah well, a bargain's a bargain.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Oct 11, 2005 10:16 pm Is it realy risky ordering from ADV and if so why?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Oct 12, 2005 3:15 pm DatDude wrote: Is it realy risky ordering from ADV and if so why?

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Oct 12, 2005 4:49 pm DatDude wrote: Is it realy risky ordering from ADV and if so why?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Jan 02, 2006 10:30 am So I ordered some stuff during ADV's latest sale back on the 17th of December. Still haven't gotten it, and an email to customer service went unanswered. Calling ADV's number listed on their website (1-800-282-7202) just gave me a message that the line has been disconnected or no longer in service. Anyone have a working number or know something else that I don't?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jan 03, 2006 2:09 pm damn i almost wish i bought the last of my eva dvd's from adv instead of therightstuf.com

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Jan 03, 2006 3:09 pm Well, it looks like ADV's number has been reconnected. I guess someone forgot to pay the phone bill. Still haven't been able to get a live person on the phone, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Jan 05, 2006 1:55 am drinian wrote: Well, it looks like ADV's number has been reconnected. I guess someone forgot to pay the phone bill. Still haven't been able to get a live person on the phone, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jan 05, 2006 4:50 pm Have fun harassing them for a month or two before you finally get what you ordered and have already paid for.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Jan 05, 2006 6:51 pm Hunter21 wrote: Have fun harassing them for a month or two before you finally get what you ordered and have already paid for.
